comments.body: NACK for now, I am working on DB changes to include SHM size and all the other things that need DB modifications now, please wait for that and rebase on top of it.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably f0843e9) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@mheon Updated to use your new database. PTAL.
Small question: why are we customizing a lot of mounts now in the spec - did something change?
@mheon AddBindMount,AddCgroupMount,AddTmpfsMount were dropped, and you are now supposed to setup your own mount spec and pass it into AddMount

:pushpin: Commit ac63235 has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`
